name: The Home Club
about: The Home Club Sports is a home and backyard recreation specialist that designs and installs custom golf simulators, putting greens, and multi-sport courts. They offer a range of packages for golfers, from standard setups for casual practice to deluxe, professional-grade systems with advanced analytics. Pricing is obtained through a free 5-minute quote form which provides custom renderings and estimates, with no consultation required for golf simulators, putting greens, and pickleball courts. The company was founded by John Schulte, an enthusiast who aimed to bring high-quality golf simulator experiences to the home environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Ultimate convenience of year-round practice in your own home or garage
Professional-grade technology with customizable ambiance and advanced analytics
No consultation needed for quick renderings and pricing on golf simulators

food_and_drink.notes: Mentioned as a use case for putting greens ('sipping on a cocktail during golden hour')
Mentioned as a use case for putting greens ('sipping on a cocktail during golden hour')

simulator_hardware.notes: Affordable entry point featuring a reliable launch monitor, hitting mat, and impact screen/netting.
Enhanced experience with high-quality projector, impact screen, and access to a broader range of virtual courses and sports.
Ultimate indoor golf setup incorporating top-tier tracking technology and integration with advanced analytics software.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental services; it is assumed customers must provide their own golf clubs for use with their installed simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website describes creating a retreat for practice and entertainment, including mentions of enjoying cocktails, suggesting that food and drink can be part of the home experience.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As an at-home installation, time to play 18 holes depends entirely on the user's pace. The service provides the technology for year-round, unlimited practice.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website highlights services for families, including backyard courts for pickleball and bocce ball, indicating the space can be kid-friendly for other sports besides golf.
